Define an image size of 256 and patch size of 32 for the ViT model
Set the number of classes to 1000, dimension to 1024, depth to 6, heads to 16, mlp_dim to 2048, dropout to 0.1, and emb_dropout to 0.1
Create a random tensor with shape (1, 3, 256, 256) representing an input image for the ViT model using torch.randn
Initialize an instance of the ViT model with the specified parameters
